name: _DoIP_IdentificationRequest
title: _DoIP_IdentificationRequest
description: A vehicle simulation has received a Vehicle Identification Request Message. The value returned will determine the reaction of the DoIP.DLL.
Note that requests not targeted at the ECU will be ignored.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: 1: No argument, VINorEID is empty2: Argument contains the EID (6 byte)3: Argument contains the VIN (17 byte/characters)

parameters.name: VINorEID
parameters.description: The argument from the request message.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
